required_env_vars.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_CALCOM_COACH_USERNAME
required_env_vars.description: Coach's Cal.com username for booking URL

tasks.name: Create coaching sessions card component structure
tasks.purpose: Set up the component file with Card container, header, and content areas following the @kit/ui/card pattern

constraints: Server component (no 'use client')
Props interface with optional sessions data
Use i18n Trans component for text

tasks.input_state: No coaching sessions card exists. Dashboard page has PageBody but no widgets.
tasks.output_state: coaching-sessions-card.tsx exists with Card structure, header with 'Coaching Sessions' title, and empty CardContent placeholder.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component file exists with Card/CardHeader/CardContent structure and renders without errors when imported.

tasks.name: Add upcoming sessions display to card content

action.target: sessions list rendering with date/time/join link

tasks.purpose: Render 1-2 upcoming sessions with formatted date, time, duration, and external join link

constraints: External link to meeting URL (opens in new tab)
Display relative time (e.g., 'Tomorrow at 2 PM')
Show duration (e.g., '60 min')
Limit to 2 sessions max

tasks.input_state: Card structure exists with empty CardContent. No session rendering logic.
tasks.output_state: CardContent displays list of sessions with date, time, duration, and 'Join Session' links. Conditional rendering based on sessions array.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Sessions render with date, time, duration, and external links. Component handles 1-2 sessions gracefully.

tasks.name: Add empty state CTA for booking sessions

action.target: Book a Session CTA when no upcoming sessions

tasks.purpose: Display call-to-action with external link to Cal.com booking page when user has no upcoming sessions

constraints: External link to Cal.com booking page (not embed)
Construct URL from NEXT_PUBLIC_CALCOM_COACH_USERNAME and NEXT_PUBLIC_CALCOM_EVENT_SLUG
Only show when sessions array is empty (length === 0)

tasks.input_state: Card structure exists. Sessions rendering added. No empty state handling.
tasks.output_state: When sessions array is empty, card displays 'Book a Session' button linking to Cal.com.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Empty state renders 'Book a Session' button with correct Cal.com URL. Button has proper accessibility attributes.
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'Book a Session' apps/web/app/home/(user)/_components/coaching-sessions-card.tsx && grep -q 'NEXT_PUBLIC_CALCOM_COACH_USERNAME' apps/web/app/home/(user)/_components/coaching-sessions-card.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add error state for null booking data

action.target: graceful fallback UI when booking data is null

tasks.purpose: Handle API failure gracefully by showing booking CTA instead of error when data fetch returns null

constraints: When props.sessions is null (API failure), show same CTA as empty state
Do not throw or show error - graceful degradation
Log warning to console for debugging (not error)

tasks.input_state: Card handles sessions and empty array. No null data handling.
tasks.output_state: Component gracefully handles null sessions prop by showing booking CTA.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: When sessions prop is null, component renders Book a Session CTA without errors or console.error calls.

tasks.name: Add responsive styling to coaching sessions card

action.target: responsive Tailwind classes for mobile/tablet/desktop grid

tasks.purpose: Ensure card adapts to grid layout breakpoints and displays well on all screen sizes

constraints: Card should fit within grid column (full width of column)
Text should remain readable on mobile
Session list should not overflow card bounds
Use semantic Tailwind classes (text-muted-foreground, etc.)

tasks.input_state: Card renders all states but may not fit grid layout properly.
tasks.output_state: Card displays responsively across breakpoints with proper spacing and text sizing.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Card renders correctly in 1-column (mobile), 2-column (tablet), and 3-column (desktop) grid layouts without overflow or readability issues.

tasks.name: Integrate coaching sessions card into dashboard page
tasks.purpose: Import and render the widget component in the dashboard page, passing coaching session data from loader

dependencies: Dashboard loader from I1.F4 (provides coachingSessions data)
constraints: Pass coachingSessions prop from page data
Position in appropriate grid row/column based on design
Maintain server component pattern (no 'use client' in page)

tasks.input_state: Dashboard page exists with PageBody. CoachingSessionsCard component complete but not integrated.
tasks.output_state: Dashboard page imports and renders CoachingSessionsCard with data from loader.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Card renders on /home page with data passed from dashboard loader. No TypeScript errors.
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'CoachingSessionsCard' apps/web/app/home/(user)/page.tsx && grep -q 'coachingSessions' apps/web/app/home/(user)/page.tsx && pnpm typecheck
